Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Luminian]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Luminians believed the Emperor lived on due to his virtue and will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The chapter house resembles a Luminian cathedral.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Luminian Pilgrims rushed forward to heal Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Luminians exterminated the last of the Dead Mother’s cults almost two hundred years ago.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Luminians refuse to heal a man's son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminians are part of the Independent alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminians are proud, strong, and easy to provoke due to their code.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The White Sun belongs to the Luminians.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Luminians lost 'the others' on the night the Emperor died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Luminians are a group mentioned in the context of assassination ramifications.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — The Luminians are a group that Shera can send messengers to in emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — The Magister's Guild assassins were once part of the Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Maxeus's assassins were trained after the Luminians lost them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Luminian words are described as polite and official.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — There are Luminian Pilgrims in the palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Luminians are cleansing the Capital of Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Luminian Pilgrims can be stung by bees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Luminians treated Benji and the others right but were not considered a family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The assassin is described as a devout Luminian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Shera and a handful of confused Luminians were standing while others knelt.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Luminians study Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Luminians know about the crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Luminians guard the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Luminian Pilgrims are experts recommended for their healing powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Luminians are an order with headquarters in Rainworth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — A Luminian is needed to heal Calder.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Luminians agree that the Great Elders may fear Guild unity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Luminians consist of white-clad Pilgrims and silver-armored knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Luminians are a group clustering behind a barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Luminians are a group that hurried behind Jorin toward an exit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — A lone Luminian was captured and included in Calder's panel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — The Luminians worship the Unknown God.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Luminian Pilgrims copied the first Beacon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Luminians are fighting side-by-side with Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Loreli spent her time with the Luminians.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
